news.t: UPDATE -- Tidal Financial Group and Defiance ETFs Announce Reverse Stock Splits for Select ETFs
Tidal Financial Group and Defiance ETFs Announce Reverse Stock Splits for Select ETFs
Defiance ETFs Launches RKLZ: the First 2X Short ETF of Rocket Lab Corporation

holdings.infoBox: RKLZ is an equity ETF with a total of 10 individual holdings. The top holdings are Cash Offset stock at 260.06%, OTHER ASSETS AND LIABILITIES at 43.70%, United States Treasury Bills 0% at 22.60%, First American Government Obligations Fund Class X at 2.09%, and US DOLLARS at -7.61%.

overview.description: The Defiance Daily Target 2x Short RKLB ETF (RKLZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. RKLZseeks to provide 2x inverseexposure to the daily share price movement ofRocket Lab Corporation(NASDAQ: RKLB), less fees and expenses. RKLZ was launched on Nov 17, 2025 and is issued by Defiance.

holdings.n: First American Government Obligations Fund Class X
